---
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  max-items: 10
  categories: true
  feed: true
---

::: {style="padding: 3.5rem 0 1.5rem; max-width: 640px;"}
# Sourangshu Pal

Writing about production AI systems — RAG pipelines, LLMs, vector search, and the engineering details that matter.
:::

---
